description: ACP proxy — routes prompts to coding agents (OpenCode, Claude Code, Codex, Copilot) via chrome-acp

features.name: Route prompt to ACP agent
features.description: Send a prompt through the ACP proxy and receive agent response

tests.name: returns string response from default agent

args: Respond with exactly the word: hello

features.name: Auto-start proxy if not running
features.description: If ACP proxy is not running, the trait starts it automatically before sending the prompt

features.name: Missing prompt returns error
features.description: Calling without a prompt should fail

features.name: Context files injection
features.description: Pass context markdown files that are prepended to the prompt as XML-wrapped context blocks
